top_signals.title: Barstool's Portnoy plans to hold bitcoin down to zero after timing it wrong every time
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: South Africa proposes crypto tax rules under existing tax framework
top_signals.summary: South Africa’s tax authority proposed draft guidance clarifying how crypto assets are taxed under existing income and capital gains tax rules, seeking public input until Aug. 31.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: How drug gangs use social media to recruit Thai air crew as couriers
top_signals.summary: Early in the morning on June 18, a message from an unknown account slipped into the TikTok inbox of a flight attendant in Bangkok with a series of questions: "Are you flying to Australia? Do ​you do carry-for-hire? What is your rate?"
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
